instruction: Change the return type from a snake_case string to a list of the individual word segments extracted during conversion. For example, camel_to_snake('camelCase') must return ['camel', 'case'] instead of 'camel_case'. camel_to_snake('myVariableName') must return ['my', 'variable', 'name']. All segments are lowercase with no underscores. Acronyms (consecutive uppercase letters) are treated as a single segment following the same rules as the original function (e.g. 'XMLParser' returns ['xml', 'parser'], 'getHTTPSResponse' returns ['get', 'https', 'response']). An empty string input returns an empty list [].
